home_dashboard.streak_widget: Top horizontal row of pills or dates. Heatmap or checkmarks to show taken vs missed.
home_dashboard.daily_timeline: Vertical scroll of cards. Each card has a time, dose, and swipe-to-log action.
home_dashboard.empty_state: Friendly illustrated vector (Lucide icon) in center. 'No meds scheduled for today!'

bubbles.user: Right aligned, #4A90D9 background, white text, rounded-tl-2xl rounded-tr-2xl rounded-bl-2xl rounded-br-sm
bubbles.ai: Left aligned, #F0F4F8 background, dark text, rounded-tl-2xl rounded-tr-2xl rounded-br-2xl rounded-bl-sm

ai_chat.input: Pill-shaped text input with a circular send button.

pharmacy_finder.map: Uses react-native-maps. Custom marker icons using Lucide-React-Native.
pharmacy_finder.on_call_tab: Segmented control at top (All vs On-Call). On-call pharmacies have a green #34C47C badge.

camera_scanner.overlay: Transparent center cutout with rounded corner brackets.
camera_scanner.results_sheet: Bottom sheet modal popping up after scan with medication info.

patterns.swipe_action: Spring animation for marking medication as taken
patterns.skeleton_loading: Shimmer effect on #EDF2F7 background for loading states

instructions_to_main_agent: Use react-native, expo, and expo-router for the app structure.
Do NOT use web-only libraries like Tailwind or shadcn/ui. Instead, translate these design guidelines into React Native StyleSheet or NativeWind classes.
Use 'testID' instead of 'data-testid' for all interactive components.
Implement Organic & Earthy archetype: Avoid harsh pure black or pure white; rely on #FCFBF8 for screen backgrounds and #FFFFFF for cards.
For empty states, utilize lucide-react-native icons scaled up with a soft #F0F4F8 circular background.
Follow the rounded-3xl (24px) border radius for major cards to keep the app friendly and approachable.
Ensure the layout provides generous padding (24px on screen edges).
